name: Crockpot Chicken and Herb Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper, place in crockpot.
2. Insert cloves into one onion.
3. Put all onions into the pot.
4. Add garlic, marjoram, thyme, bay leaf, and wine.
5. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 6 hours.
6. Remove bay leaf and cloves.
7. Stir in sour cream.
8. Increase heat to high.
9. Combine biscuit mix with parsley.
10. Stir milk into biscuit mix until well moistened.
11. Drop dumplings from a teaspoon around the edge of the pot.
12. Cover and cook on high for 30 minutes.
